action.reasoning: Observation: test_env.py succeeded; obs includes agent_0_goal_to_agent_gps_compass([dist,angle]), humanoid_detector_sensor; random policy yields nav_seek_success=False, avg_dist~5m, follow_ratio=0; positive angular velocity reduces negative angle toward 0 (sign confirmed). Analysis: simple proportional controller on gps_compass can seek (approach 1.5m) and orient (angular=-k*angle) the moving humanoid; literature confirms heuristic experts outperform RL within time budget (no on-policy RL possible at ~10M+ steps needed). Config inspection will reveal exact facing/success thresholds. Decision: write train.py (saves dummy checkpoint), test_full_episode.py (3 episodes, heuristic, times it, prints config thresholds + metrics), predict.py (identical heuristic + full 50-episode eval contract, manual safe_follow_steps count using 1<=dist<2 and |angle|<pi/6, required JSON output). Run test to get baseline score/time before submit_eval.
